seo.title: Vigil Services Ltd — care, staffing, security and cleaning
seo.description: Vigil Services Ltd is the parent group behind four specialist divisions — care and support, healthcare staffing, security and commercial cleaning. Choose the service you need.

nap.address: Ferguson House, 113 Cranbrook Road, Ilford IG1 4PU

fields._note: One continuous hero. Balanced four-division representation (founder review): art-directed composites — desktop is four equal 25% panels (Care, Staffing, Security, Cleaning, left→right, aligned to the gateway below); mobile is a 2×2. A full-width top scrim carries the headline without singling out any division. Provisional composites built from the founder reference; replace with a licensed production photograph before cutover.

hero_image.alt: Vigil care, care-staffing, security and cleaning professionals — one from each division.

hero_image_mobile.alt: Vigil care, care-staffing, security and cleaning professionals — one from each division.

fields.heading:
Essential people.
Exceptional service.
fields.sub: Delivering care, security, staffing and cleaning services you can trust, every day.

fields.statement: At Vigil Services Ltd, we combine skilled people with high standards to deliver peace of mind.
